name: Easy Crockpot Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. Before going to bed, brown the pork roast in a skillet with a small amount of oil.
2. Peel and slice 1 large onion.
3. Place half of the onion in the bottom of the crockpot.
4. Put the roast into the crockpot and add 1/2 to 3/4 cup water.
5. Add the remaining onion and cloves.
6. Set the crockpot to low heat.
7. In the morning, turn off the crockpot, remove the meat, and let it cool.
8. Discard the onion and juices in the crockpot.
9. Tear the roast into small pieces and put them back into the crockpot.
10. Add barbecue sauce until the meat is juicy.
11. Cook on low for 2 to 3 hours or until the flavors are well blended and hot.
12. Serve on buns.
